description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a snow crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a pale orange to reddish-brown coloration. The crab has ten long, slender legs, including two prominent front claws (chelae) that are slightly darker at the tips. The surface of the carapace and legs is hard and slightly rough, with visible segmentations and subtle textural details. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and small antennae are faintly visible. The underside is lighter in color, and the overall form is low and wide, typical of marine crabs. This crustacean would be found in seafood markets, restaurants, or as food waste in urban environments.
description: A detailed, orange-brown snow crab with a domed carapace, long segmented legs, and visible front claws. The surface is hard and slightly rough, with eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both claws extended, and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the length and segmentation of the legs and the curvature of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full spread of all legs and the smooth, slightly domed back of the carapace.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, emphasizing the slenderness of the legs and the crab's lateral profile.
